# Nicolas R. (atoomic)

> Nicolas R. — known online as atoomic — is a technology leader specializing in agentic orchestration, AI-assisted engineering, and resilient Perl/CPAN systems. He leads a department at WebPros and is a long-time open-source contributor to the Perl toolchain. This is his personal portfolio at https://atoomic.org/.

## Profile & expertise
- [Home](https://atoomic.org/): Technology leader building agentic systems, AI-assisted engineering workflows, and resilient platforms.
- [About](https://atoomic.org/#about): Depth in systems engineering combined with direction in AI delivery.
- [Capabilities](https://atoomic.org/#capabilities): Agentic orchestration, AI-assisted development, and RAG & knowledge systems.
- [Skills](https://atoomic.org/#skills): Languages and runtimes (Perl, Python, C, XS, JavaScript, PHP, Swift), AI tooling, frameworks, and infrastructure.
- [Experience](https://atoomic.org/#experience): Leadership and architecture roles across hosting, platforms, and innovation.
- [FAQ](https://atoomic.org/#faq): Frequently asked questions about Nicolas R.'s work and how to reach him.

## Open source
- [GitHub — atoomic](https://github.com/atoomic): Source repositories and projects.
- [MetaCPAN — ATOOMIC](https://metacpan.org/author/ATOOMIC): Published Perl modules on CPAN.
